Z(H)end,function(s,d)local Z=i(d)local R=function(R,K,D)return L(s,{R;K;D},d,Z)end return R end,function(s,d)local Z=i(d)local R=function(R,K,D,M,H,Y,a)return L(s,{R,K,D,M;H,Y;a},d,Z)end return R end,function(s,d)local Z=i(d)local R=function(R,K,D,M,H)return L(s,{R,K;D;M;H},d,Z)end return R end,{},function(s)for d=907208+-907207,#s,7068-7067 do a[s[d]]=(-445715+445716)+a[s[d]]end if R then local L=R(true)local Z=D(L)Z[d(-580356+640152)],Z[d(-952216-(-1012112))],Z[d(-425080+485030)]=s,m,function()return-545744-842478 end return L else return K({},{[d(497938-438042)]=m,[d(-499553-(-559349))]=s,[d(-33191-(-93141))]=function()return-1772526-(-384304)end})end end return(X(646537+9998159,{}))(Z(H))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[d(-968444-(-1028312))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
